candidates.duration_hint_text: Most sessions last 5-6 days; mini camps for grades 3-4 last 2 nights.

overnight_evidence.snippet: Campers stay in our one-room, bunk-style cabins with other youth their age and well-trained staff to guide them through adventures.

recent_activity_evidence.snippet: 2026 Youth Camp REGISTRATION OPENS AT 12pm on January 15!

candidates.notes: Faith-based camp; wide range of sessions for grades 3-12 plus family and specialty camps.

candidates.candidate_name: Farragut State Park (Group Camps, Hosted Youth Retreats)
candidates.operator_name: Idaho Department of Parks and Recreation
candidates.duration_hint_text: Group camps, cabins, and use areas available for week-long and shorter periods; hosts many external youth programs and retreats.

overnight_evidence.snippet: Farragut State Park offers group camps, 10 camping cabins, large group use areas, and multiple overnight facilities. Regular host site for large organized youth camps (e.g., 4-H Horse Camp)

recent_activity_evidence.snippet: June 24-28, 2026: Equus Echoes 4H Horse camp. The equestrian campsites will be closed. The equestrian arena will be closed June 25th – 27th.

candidates.notes: Venue is a state park and multi-venue host for overnight youth programs, not an operator of its own youth camp. Venue is active for 2026.
validation_needs: venue_unconfirmed: operator and session details for each external youth camp to be resolved in followup scans
